metadata.title: Kluub - Nightlife & Events in Tallinn, Tartu & Pärnu
metadata.description: Discover the best nightlife in Estonia — club nights, parties, DJ sets, and events in Tallinn, Tartu, and Pärnu. Browse by date, venue, and price to find out what's happening tonight.

landingPage.title: Discover the perfect event for every occasion
landingPage.subtitle: Choose your location and find the perfect match.

eventsPage.loadError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

joinPage.heroTitle: Put your events on the map
joinPage.heroSubtitle: Kluub.ee is Estonia's growing nightlife and events platform. Promote your venue and events to thousands of visitors in Tallinn, Tartu, and Pärnu.
joinPage.whyJoinSubtitle: You create the event. We create its audience
joinPage.benefit1Desc: Kluub.ee puts your venue in front of thousands of nightlife and event enthusiasts actively looking for where to go tonight. Discover new regulars who wouldn't have found you otherwise.
joinPage.benefit2Desc: Import your Facebook events with a single click. No need to copy data manually, we handle it for you.
joinPage.benefit3Desc: The Backstage dashboard makes adding and managing events quick and easy. Possible to set up recurring events once and they publish automatically every week.
joinPage.benefit4Desc: Track how much interest your events generate. Data-driven decisions help you plan and market your events better.
joinPage.benefit5Desc: Need something special? We help build custom integrations, like automatically importing events from your website to Kluub.
joinPage.benefit6Desc: We're constantly improving the platform. New features and integrations are already on the way, including a mobile app.
joinPage.ctaSubtitle: Joining is simple and quick. Get in touch and we'll help you every step of the way.

backstage.welcomeMessage: The venue dashboard is coming soon. You'll be able to manage your events here.
